song.title: When we all come together
song.lyrics: [v1] .D When we all come together . Each one has a song, . A7 Has a psalm or a teaching .D Enjoyed all day long. .D Has a spiritual song . Or a hymn in their heart, . A7 E7 And the meeting begins . A7 With a fresh living start. .D A7 Each on can prophesy . D When we meet all can speak. . G Each one can prophesy, . D G D A7 D 'Tis this we earnestly must seek.
